name: Plausible Analytics
description: Plausible is a lightweight, privacy-friendly web analytics platform. Query visitor stats, pageviews, traffic sources, and goal conversions without cookies. Manage sites, goals, and shared links through the API.

capabilities.name: stats_query
capabilities.description: Query analytics data with metrics, dimensions, filters, and date ranges using the Stats API v2.

capabilities.name: realtime_visitors_get
capabilities.description: Get the current number of visitors on a site in real-time.

capabilities.name: events_send
capabilities.description: Send a pageview or custom event to Plausible for tracking.

capabilities.name: sites_list
capabilities.description: List all sites in the account with pagination.

capabilities.name: sites_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details and configuration for a specific site.

capabilities.name: sites_create
capabilities.description: Create a new site in the Plausible account.

capabilities.name: sites_update
capabilities.description: Update a site domain name and tracker configuration.

capabilities.name: sites_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a site and all its associated analytics data.

capabilities.name: goals_list
capabilities.description: List all goals configured for a site.

capabilities.name: goals_create
capabilities.description: Find or create a goal for a site.

capabilities.name: shared_links_create
capabilities.description: Find or create a shared dashboard link.

capabilities.name: teams_list
capabilities.description: List accessible teams and their API availability status.
